status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task — only one at a time.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.name: Analytics PDF export
features.description: Staff can download a PDF report of KPIs and booking trends from the admin dashboard.
features.title: Analytics PDF export
features.user_visible_behavior: Staff can download a PDF report of KPIs and booking trends from the admin dashboard.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test analytics
Start the Django server and authenticate as staff.
Hit GET /api/analytics/report/pdf/ and confirm a valid PDF is returned (non-zero Content-Length, Content-Type: application/pdf).
Open the PDF and verify charts/tables render without broken images.

features.name: Movie listing, detail, and showtimes by date
features.description: Users can browse movies, open a detail page, and see available showtimes filtered by date.
features.title: Movie listing, detail, and showtimes by date
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can browse movies, open a detail page, and see available showtimes filtered by date.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test apps.movies
GET /api/movies/ returns paginated list.
GET /api/movies/{id}/showtimes/?date=YYYY-MM-DD returns showtimes for that date only.

features.name: Seat hold and booking flow
features.description: Users can hold seats (15-min session cap, 5-min per-seat TTL), confirm a booking, and receive tickets.
features.title: Seat hold and booking flow
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can hold seats (15-min session cap, 5-min per-seat TTL), confirm a booking, and receive tickets.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test apps.bookings
Attempt to hold the same seat concurrently from two sessions — second request must be rejected.
Hold a seat, wait for 5-min TTL to expire, confirm seat is auto-released via WebSocket event.
features.notes: Seat hold uses Lua compare-and-delete in Redis — do not replace with plain GET+DEL.

features.name: VNPay and MoMo payment callbacks
features.description: Bookings are confirmed and tickets issued after successful payment from either gateway.
features.title: VNPay and MoMo payment callbacks
features.user_visible_behavior: Bookings are confirmed and tickets issued after successful payment from either gateway.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test apps.bookings.tests.test_payments
Simulate a VNPay HMAC-SHA512 callback — booking status must change to CONFIRMED.
Simulate a MoMo IPN POST — same confirmation flow runs.
features.notes: Both callback endpoints are AllowAny — HMAC verification is the auth mechanism.

features.name: Promotions validation and mutual exclusion with points
features.description: Users can apply a promo code OR use loyalty points at checkout — never both simultaneously.
features.title: Promotions validation and mutual exclusion with points
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can apply a promo code OR use loyalty points at checkout — never both simultaneously.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test apps.promotions
Attempt to submit a booking with both points_used > 0 and a promo code — API must reject with 400.
Apply a valid promo code and confirm discount_amount matches promo value.
features.notes: FlatPricePromotion.is_active is managed by nightly Celery task — never set it in code.

features.name: Loyalty points earn and redeem
features.description: Users earn points only on full-price bookings; redeemed points reduce the ticket price.
features.title: Loyalty points earn and redeem
features.user_visible_behavior: Users earn points only on full-price bookings; redeemed points reduce the ticket price.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test apps.users
Complete a full-price booking — PointTransaction EARN record must be created.
Complete a discounted booking (promo or points) — no points must be awarded.
features.notes: Points earned only when points_used == 0 AND discount_amount == 0.

features.name: Concessions ordering
features.description: Users can add food and beverage items (including combos) to their booking.
features.title: Concessions ordering
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can add food and beverage items (including combos) to their booking.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test apps.concessions
GET /api/concessions/ returns items with variants.
POST a ConcessionOrder attached to a booking — ConcessionItems are created with correct prices.

features.name: 7-step booking wizard (frontend)
features.description: Users complete the full booking flow: movie → showtime → seats → concessions → promo/points → confirm → payment redirect.
features.title: 7-step booking wizard (frontend)
features.user_visible_behavior: Users complete the full booking flow: movie → showtime → seats → concessions → promo/points → confirm → payment redirect.
verification: cd frontend && pnpm run build  # must exit 0
cd frontend && pnpm run type-check  # must exit 0
Walk through all 7 wizard steps in the browser and confirm no console errors.
features.notes: WebSocket seat updates use the ws://localhost:8000/ws/showtime/{id}/ channel.

features.name: Analytics dashboard KPIs (API)
features.description: Admin API returns revenue totals, occupancy rates, and top movies for a given date range.
features.title: Analytics dashboard KPIs (API)
features.user_visible_behavior: Admin API returns revenue totals, occupancy rates, and top movies for a given date range.
verification: cd backend && uv run python manage.py test analytics
GET /api/analytics/kpis/?start=YYYY-MM-DD&end=YYYY-MM-DD returns expected fields.
Verify numbers match a manual count of Booking/Ticket rows for the same range.
features.notes: Only begin after analytics-001 (PDF export) is passing.
